subject: Invoice overdue for March web hosting
body: Hi team, our March hosting invoice is now five days overdue. Please process payment today to avoid service interruption.

subject: Lunch catch-up next week
body: Hey, are you free for lunch next Wednesday to chat about the conference? No rush if your schedule is packed.

subject: Customer bug report on checkout flow
body: A customer reported that the checkout button spins forever after entering card details. Can engineering investigate today?

subject: Updated Q2 marketing deck
body: Sharing the latest Q2 marketing deck for review before tomorrow's leadership sync. Feedback is welcome by 4 PM.

subject: Password reset confirmation
body: This is a confirmation that your account password was successfully reset. No action is required if this was you.

subject: Interview availability for backend role
body: Thanks for applying. Please send your availability for a 45-minute technical interview sometime this week.

subject: Team offsite itinerary draft
body: Attached is the first draft of the team offsite itinerary. Please check your travel preferences and dietary restrictions.

subject: Production alert: API latency spike
body: Monitoring detected API latency above threshold for the last 12 minutes in the primary region. Please acknowledge immediately.

subject: Newsletter subscription welcome
body: Welcome to our product newsletter. We'll send a monthly digest of feature releases and community highlights.

subject: Legal review needed for vendor agreement
body: Please review the updated vendor agreement before signature. The supplier is asking for redlines by end of day Thursday.

subject: Your package has shipped
body: Your package has shipped and is expected to arrive on Friday. Track shipment with the link in your account.

subject: Board meeting prep questions
body: Can you send updated revenue assumptions and hiring numbers before the board prep session tomorrow morning?

subject: Vacation auto-reply notice
body: I am out of office until Monday and will respond when I return. For urgent items contact the support desk.

subject: Security audit questionnaire
body: Our enterprise customer requires the attached security audit questionnaire completed before procurement can proceed.

subject: Feature request from key account
body: A strategic customer asked whether we can support bulk export filters in the next release. Please advise on feasibility.
